name: Arka Vertical Garden
benefit_description: Total Cost of One Unit of Arka Vertical Garden: ₹22,100/-. Subsidy Amount per Unit: ₹15,525/-. Beneficiary Contribution: ₹6,575/- per unit. The beneficiaries are also provided with the following - One unit of Arka Vertical Garden structure of one square meter area that can be installed. The structur
details: The scheme "Arka Vertical Garden" by the State Horticulture Mission-Kerala aims to popularize user-friendly vertical garden structures designed and developed by the Indian Council of Agricultural Research (ICAR) - Indian Institute of Horticultural Research, Bengalaru under Rashtriya Krishi Vikas Yojana (RKVY). The scheme helps in attaining self-sufficiency in the production of safe-to-eat vegetables ensuring food and nutritional security for families. It is open to residents of Kerala State who
eligibility_text: The applicant must be a resident of Kerala. The applicant must not have availed Arka Vertical Garden structure during the previous year.

eligibility_criteria.criterion: Must be a resident of Kerala
